notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the java-1.8.0-openjdk SRPM in CIQ Bridge for CentOS 7.9. It addresses 6 CVEs: CVE-2024-21131, CVE-2024-21138, CVE-2024-21140, CVE-2024-21144, CVE-2024-21145, and 1 more.
